scripts.build:github: tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode github-pages && node scripts/generate-service-worker.mjs /solar-system-sim-design/
scripts.test: npm run typecheck:scripts && npm run verify:app && npm run verify:rockets && npm run verify:scenarios && npm run verify:service-worker
scripts.verify:math: python3 scripts/verify_orbit_math.py && python3 scripts/verify_camera_framing.py && python3 scripts/verify_planet_orbits_against_jpl.py && python3 scripts/verify_minor_body_data.py && python3 scripts/verify_ephemeris_fidelity.py && python3 scripts/verify_orientation_models.py && python3 scripts/verify_label_scaling.py && python3 scripts/verify_moon_scaling.py && python3 scripts/verify_rocket_catalog.py && python3 scripts/verify_rocket_transfer_math.py && python3 scripts/verify_lambert_transfer.py && npx tsx scripts/verify_orbital_transfer.ts && python3 scripts/verify_scenario_fidelity.py && python3 scripts/verify_render_quality.py && python3 scripts/verify_authored_experiences.py
